---
name: incose-review
description: Reviews a system requirement against INCOSE guidelines. Use this skill when asked to review, score, or evaluate a requirement.
argument-hint: [paste requirement here]
---

# INCOSE Requirement Review

When given a requirement, evaluate it against each of the 40 conditions below.
For each condition, determine if the requirement passes (✅) or fails (❌).

## Output Format

Respond with the following structure:

### Score: X / 40

### Condition Results
| # | Condition | Result | Notes |
|---|-----------|--------|-------|
| 1 | Necessary | ✅/❌ | Brief reason only if failed |
| 2 | ... | | |

### Failed Conditions — Details
For each failed condition, provide a one-paragraph explanation of why it failed.

### Suggestions for Improvement
Provide a numbered list of concrete rewrites or additions that would improve the score.

---

## The 40 INCOSE Conditions

1. **Necessary** — [paste criteria here]
2. **Unambiguous** — [paste criteria here]
3. **...** — [paste criteria here]
...
40. **...** — [paste criteria here]
